notes: Full lifecycle via action buttons: Draft->Submitted->Approved->In Production->Quality Check->Completed on ORD-016. All buttons work correctly after frontend rebuild. Page auto-refreshes after each transition.
Quality Hold loop on ORD-006: quality_check->quality_hold->quality_check->quality_hold->quality_check. Release and Quality Hold buttons work correctly in cycle.

Reject and resubmit flow on ORD-020: Admin rejected (submitted->draft), Operator resubmitted (draft->submitted), Admin approved (submitted->approved). Operator sees 'No actions available' for submitted orders.
Multiple cards in same column display correctly. Approved column shows 4-5 cards, In Production shows 5-6 cards, each with order #, priority badge, product name, and quantity.

15 seed orders (ORD-001 to ORD-015) distributed across 7 columns: Draft(3), Submitted(2), Approved(2), In Production(3), Quality Check(2), Quality Hold(1), Completed(2). Verified on initial Workflows page load.
Success notification shows transition details. Dragged ORD-019 from Submitted to Approved, toast displayed: 'ORD-019: Submitted → Approved' with green checkmark.

Error notification on invalid drag verified via source code: 'Cannot move from X to Y'. Frontend TRANSITION_MAP restricts valid transitions; unmapped drops show error toast and card stays in original column.
API rejects Approved->Draft: "Cannot 'reject' from status 'approved'. Valid from: submitted"
API rejects In Production->Approved: "Cannot 'approve' from status 'in_production'. Valid from: submitted"
API rejects Quality Check->In Production: "Cannot 'start_production' from status 'quality_check'. Valid from: approved"
API rejects Quality Hold->Draft: "Cannot 'reject' from status 'quality_hold'. Valid from: submitted"
API rejects Quality Hold->Approved: "Cannot 'approve' from status 'quality_hold'. Valid from: submitted"
Kanban accessible by all roles. Admin, Supervisor, and Operator all successfully view the Workflows page with the full Kanban board and all columns visible.
Skipped per test plan (P4 priority).
Server enforces role restrictions: Operator trying to approve returns 'Role operator cannot perform approve'. On API failure, client refetches orders, returning card to original column.
Admin can access Settings page at /settings. Page displays tabs (Users, Production Lines, Products), Users table with 5 seed users.
Supervisor redirected from Settings to Dashboard (/) with 'Access denied' error toast.
Operator redirected from Settings to Dashboard (/) with 'Access denied' error toast.
Access denied notification appears for non-admin (both Supervisor and Operator). Red error toast with 'Access denied' text displayed.
Users tab: table renders with 'Users list' accessible name, column headers, and 5 data rows with Edit/Delete action buttons.
Users table columns are Name, Email, Role, Actions. Missing expected 'Status' and 'Last Login' columns.
5 seed users displayed: Admin, Jan Novak (supervisor), Petra Svoboda (operator), Tomas Dvorak (operator), Eva Kralova (operator).
Add User button opens a dialog form titled 'Add User' with Save and Cancel buttons.
Form fields are Name, Email, Role, Password. Missing expected 'Status' field; has 'Password' field instead.
All required fields validated. Server returns 'name, email, password, and role are required' when submitting empty form. UI shows 'Save failed' error toast.
